title: clematis viticella subsp. normalis
intro: Clematis viticella subsp. normalis, also known as the purple clematis, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) native to Europe and Western Asia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of clematis viticella subsp. normalis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and soothing digestive issues. The plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
